name: pubcraft
description: Pubcraft — a Claude skill that produces researched, E-E-A-T-compliant, human-reading articles, newsletters (Substack/Beehiiv), Medium essays, Hacker News submissions, short-video scripts (TikTok/Reels/Shorts), and platform-native social posts (LinkedIn, X, Reddit, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, Quora, Indie Hackers, Dev.to, Hashnode) plus Product Hunt launch copy that survive Google's and each platform's current spam and AI-content policies.

plugins.name: pubcraft
plugins.description: Researched, E-E-A-T-compliant content writer for articles, newsletters, Medium, Hacker News, short-video (TikTok/Reels/Shorts), and platform-native social posts (LinkedIn, X, Reddit, Threads, Bluesky, Mastodon, Quora, Indie Hackers, Dev.to, Hashnode, Product Hunt). Anti-AI-slop style enforcement, YMYL/regulated-vertical compliance, and 2026-current AI-disclosure rules (TikTok C2PA, EU AI Act).
